name: Blackbaud Raiser's Edge Nonprofit CRM API
what_it_does: Blackbaud Raiser's Edge (SKY API) REST API for nonprofit donor relationship management and fundraising platform. Enables AI agents to manage constituent and donor records, access gift and pledge history, retrieve major gift pipeline and portfolio data, handle event management and volunteer tracking, manage grant prospect research data, access communication and marketing data, retrieve fundraising analytics and campaign performance, generate gift acknowledgment workflows, and integrate donor data with financial and program management systems.
use_cases: Accessing donor records and gift history from major gift management agents
Managing campaign pipeline and prospect portfolios from frontline fundraising agents
Retrieving fundraising analytics and donor segmentation from development analytics agents
Automating gift acknowledgment and stewardship from donor relations agents
not_for: For-profit CRM without nonprofit donor management and gift processing focus
Small nonprofits without major gift and institutional fundraising workflows
Volunteer-only organizations without major gift fundraising programs
best_when: A university, hospital, cultural institution, or large nonprofit using Blackbaud Raiser's Edge NXT wants AI agents to automate donor analytics, prospect research, gift acknowledgment, and fundraising campaign management.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Major donor wealth screening and financial capacity data is highly sensitive. Donor political affiliations and giving patterns are private. Prospect research data should be treated as confidential business intelligence. Automated outreach must comply with CAN-SPAM.

auth.notes: Blackbaud SKY API uses OAuth 2.0 for all API access. Organization-level credentials with constituent, gift, event, and analytics scopes. Developer portal with comprehensive documentation. Blackbaud Marketplace for partner integrations. Webhooks for real-time events. Well-maintained REST API.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — nonprofit enterprise CRM pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual per-user pricing; enterprise pricing for large institutions
pricing.notes: Charleston, South Carolina. NASDAQ: BLKB. Founded 1981. Dominant nonprofit technology platform. Raiser's Edge NXT is cloud version. Used by universities, hospitals, museums, arts organizations, and major nonprofits. 45,000+ customers. Competes with Salesforce NPSP for major gift CRM. Multiple data breaches (2020).

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in SKY API portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Major donor wealth and giving data is highly sensitive — treat as confidential business intelligence
No public MCP server — OAuth2 SKY API with developer portal and Marketplace
2020 security breach history — verify current security posture and BAA status
Prospect research and wealth screening data has ethical constraints on automated sharing
GDPR compliance for international donors — constituent data deletion requests apply
SKY API is the modern API — legacy Raiser's Edge NETAPI is deprecated, use SKY API
agent_readiness.security_notes: Major donor and nonprofit financial data. SOC2, PCI-DSS, GDPR. OAuth2 scoped. Multi-region. Prior breach history (2020) — verify current controls. Donor wealth data extra sensitivity.

security_score_components.security_notes: Donor and nonprofit data. SOC2, PCI-DSS, GDPR. OAuth2. Multi-region. 2020 breach — verify current controls. Donor wealth data sensitivity.
